title: Move expression UI into workspace
description: Convert the existing expression Toplevel UI into the second main-window workspace, preserving expression commands and core enhancement logic.
acceptance_criteria: Expression extraction appears in the same main window.
No independent Toplevel opens for the default expression entry path.
The negative/confused/single/template-4 acceptance sample output remains unchanged.
Repeated enhancement and multi-group input still pass verification.
convergence: Do not change enhance_expression_text or expression library parsing unless a migration bug requires a narrow fix.
